'''radhama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zacatuche|zacatuche]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-dh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zacatuche|zacatuche]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| radhama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rædhæmæth|rædhæmæth]] || [[word:rædhæmæj|rædhæmæj]] || [[word:rædhæmæsh|rædhæmæsh]] || [[word:rædhæmæ|rædhæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:radhadhamath|radhadhamath]] || [[word:radhadhamaj|radhadhamaj]] || [[word:radhadhamash|radhadhamash]] || [[word:radhadhama|radhadhama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:radhamath|radhamath]] || [[word:radhamaj|radhamaj]] || [[word:radhamash|radhamash]] || [[word:radhama|radhama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:radhafmath|radhafmath]] || [[word:radhafmaj|radhafmaj]] || [[word:radhafmash|radhafmash]] || [[word:radhafmaf|radhafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:radhamatha|radhamatha]] || [[word:radhamaja|radhamaja]] || [[word:radhamasha|radhamasha]] || [[word:radhamaka|radhamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:radhamath|radhamath]] || [[word:radhamaj|radhamaj]] || [[word:radhamash|radhamash]] || [[word:radhama|radhama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:radhamathal|radhamathal]] || [[word:radhamajal|radhamajal]] || [[word:radhamashal|radhamashal]] || [[word:radhamakal|radhamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:radhamathatha|radhamathatha]] || [[word:radhamajaja|radhamajaja]] || [[word:radhamashasha|radhamashasha]] || [[word:radhamaka|radhamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:radhamathan|radhamathan]] || [[word:radhamajan|radhamajan]] || [[word:radhamashan|radhamashan]] || [[word:radhamakan|radhamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:radhamathaoro|radhamathaoro]] || [[word:radhamajaoro|radhamajaoro]] || [[word:radhamashaoro|radhamashaoro]] || [[word:radhamakaoro|radhamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
